meta.name: Adapter8004 delegate.xyz upgrade - Ethereum Mainnet (TEMPLATE)
meta.description: TEMPLATE - NOT READY TO IMPORT. The mainnet implementation is not yet deployed (deferred until gas is cheaper). After Step 1 deploys the mainnet implementation, replace the placeholder `data` value with the finalized calldata: 0x4f1ef286 + pad32(<mainnet implementation address>) + 0000...0040 + 0000...0000 (the upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes) encoding with an empty initializer). The script DeployAdapterImplementation.s.sol prints this exact `data`. See deployments/2026-05-16-delegate-xyz-upgrade-runbook.md.
